productDisplayName: Puma Men Knitted Navy Blue Sweater
description: Composition Navy blue knit t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed V-neck that has a yellow lining, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs that have yellow detailing, two thick yellow bands on left sleeve above the elbow, embroidered and coloured branding on left chest and has a ribbed hem with yellow detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Flaunt your brand statement in style with this knit t-shirt from puma. The full sleeves and pure cotton fabric are sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while you saunter around in the warm sun. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1', Shoulders-18"
